title: Hubli, Karnataka — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Hubli, Karnataka: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Hubli is a city in Karnataka with a population of 950,000. A major commercial and industrial center in North Karnataka, known for its cotton and textile industries.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
